title: Why Adani Built His Own Port? #shorts
description:
A business decision that changed everything.

Facing delays and losses due to slow government ports, Adani chose to build his own port.
This move not only solved his problem but also transformed India’s logistics ecosystem.

Sometimes, solving your own problem can build an entire industry.
